panels.name: Readmission Labs — Recurrent PE
panels.preview: NEW troponin elevation (0.18, up from negative). BNP elevated (640). CBC stable. Cr 0.9 (normal). INR 1.1, aPTT baseline (drawn pre-heparin). Lactate normal. Consistent with intermediate-risk (submassive) PE with right-heart strain.

panels.name: Hospital Day 3 — Liver Mass / Malignancy Workup
panels.preview: LFTs mildly abnormal (ALP 142, mild transaminitis), bilirubin normal, synthetic function intact (albumin 4.0, INR 1.1 off anticoagulation effect). AFP mildly elevated (24, nonspecific), CEA normal, CA 19-9 normal. Hepatitis B and C serologies negative. Thrombophilia testing deferred (acute clot + on anticoagulation).

panels.name: ED Admission Labs — Acute PE/DVT
panels.preview: WBC 11.8 (mild). Hgb 14.6, Plt 268. Cr 0.9 (normal renal function). Troponin NEGATIVE. D-dimer markedly elevated. LDH normal, uric acid normal. INR 1.0, aPTT 30 (baseline, pre-anticoagulation). LFTs near-normal.

panels.name: Routine Labs (work physical)
panels.preview: Pre-illness baseline. CBC normal (WBC 6.4, Hgb 15.0, Plt 250). CMP normal incl. Cr 0.9 and normal LFTs. Lipids borderline. A1c 5.4.
